ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Kanto-form Grimer: purple sludge Pokémon with wide grin in industrial setting matches swsh9-84 record. National Pokedex no. 88, illustrated by Masakazu Fukuda.

trivia_bullets.text: Second Kanto Grimer print in corpus. DAA-100 (Darkness Ablaze 100/189) by Ryota Murayama was trivia'd in Wave 14 with a pollution/eco-critique angle. This BRS-084 is by Masakazu Fukuda. Both prints share identical flavor text — same bleak ecological punchline, two different artists.

"The wastewater coming from factories is clean these days, so Grimer have nothing to eat. They're said to be on the verge of extinction." The irony — a pollution-born Pokémon endangered by environmental cleanup — is identical across both corpus Grimer prints.

In the Pokemon TCG, Kanto Grimer is classified as Darkness-type despite being Poison-type in the main series. The TCG energy system collapses most Poison-types into Darkness. The Poison Gas attack is mechanically apt despite the energy type shift.
Brilliant Stars (SWSH9), released February 25, 2022. Grimer appears as a low-rarity Darkness-type common in a set headlined by Arceus VSTAR and Hisui-region theming.

related_cards.name: Grimer
related_cards.note: First corpus Grimer, same flavor text, Ryota Murayama art
